name: academorix/leads
purpose: Lead intake pipeline — Lead prospective-family row, LeadActivity append-only timeline, and LeadTask follow-up queue attached per Lead.
capabilities: Lead Eloquent model with stage state machine
LeadActivity append-only timeline entry per Lead
LeadTask follow-up task attached to a Lead
Duplicate detection on email + phone fingerprint
Webhook out for downstream CRM sync
when_to_use: Capturing prospective customers from a marketing form and routing them through qualification.
when_not_to_use: For existing-customer referrals + rewards, use the sibling academorix/referrals package.
